name: awareness_session
timeline_note: Awareness engagements run 2 weeks from incoming request to decision. Session assumed Day 7. All due dates computed as TODAY + due_date_offset_days.

default_custom_fields.note: All values are plain text strings — no enum GID lookup needed. Allowed values match the GCA_GTM_ field descriptions.

milestones.name: ♦ Session Confirmed — {company}
milestones.notes: Milestone: Session date, format, and attendee list locked with field rep. Opstree architect assigned.

milestones.name: ♦ Session Delivered — {company}
milestones.notes: Milestone: Awareness session delivered to customer audience. Mark complete to count toward Asana Goal 5 (Awareness Sessions).

milestones.name: ♦ Decision Made — {company}
milestones.notes: Milestone: Outcome decided — Promote to Pre-Sales, No Interest, or TBD. Stage field updated accordingly.

subtasks.name: [Day 1] Confirm session date & logistics with field rep
subtasks.notes: Owner: CE | Confirm date, time, format (in-person or virtual), and expected attendee list with the field rep.

subtasks.name: [Day 1] Assign Opstree architect
subtasks.notes: Owner: CE | Identify and confirm availability of the right Opstree architect based on customer tech stack and session topic.

subtasks.name: [Day 5] Align on demo scope & key messages
subtasks.notes: Owner: CE + Opstree | Agree on GCA demo flow, key messages, and Q&A prep tailored to the customer audience. 2 days before the assumed session date.

subtasks.name: [Day 7] ✅ SESSION DELIVERED — {company} awareness session
subtasks.notes: Owner: CE + Opstree | Mark complete when session is delivered. THIS TASK IS COUNTED BY ASANA GOAL 5 (Awareness Sessions). Keep at top level for Goal tracking.

subtasks.name: [Day 8] Capture interest signals & attendee list
subtasks.notes: Owner: CE | Log attendee names, seniority, and observed interest level. Note any technical questions raised.

subtasks.name: [Day 8] Follow-up email to field rep with next steps
subtasks.notes: Owner: CE | Send session summary and recommended next steps (promote to Pre-Sales / no interest / needs more time).

subtasks.name: [Day 14] Decision: Promote to Pre-Sales / No Interest / TBD
subtasks.notes: Owner: CE | Update GCA_GTM_Stage field on parent task. If interested: move to Pre-Sales section. If not: set GCA_GTM_Outcome = No Interest. GCA_GTM_Risk Flag auto-sets to Going Cold after 10 days of no action.
